programme.title: In Old Caliente
programme.desc: Americans come West to California in the hope of peaceful settlement

programme.title: Man of the Forest
programme.desc: The kidnapping of an heir to a ranch goes awry when the Man of the Forest mistrusted by the heiress takes matters into his own hands with the help of his pet cougar

programme.title: The Fastest Gun Alive
programme.desc: In the western frontier town of Cross Creek storekeeper George Temple is a polite and soft spoken man with a secret past When 3 bank robbers on the lam stop in town to change horses Georges past comes back to haunt him

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Caddyshack 2
programme.desc: A real estate tycoon vows revenge when his membership in a luxurious club is rejected So he strikes back by buying the club and turning it into an amusement park

programme.title: The Old Spanish Trail
programme.desc:
The Old Spanish Trail is a documentary film about the historic trail tracking the journey of Richard Waller Otis Calef and Jim Clark on horseback 1200 miles from Los Angeles to Santa Fe They rode the trail in two legs fall of 2014 and summer of 2015
The Old Spanish Trail witnessed a brief but furious heyday between 1830 and 1848 as a trade route linking Santa Fe New Mexico and Los Angeles California The riders run into problems staying true to trail because of highways and private land during their ride tracing the past The film is a reminder to all of us to protect and preserve the natural landscape and its trails

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dragon Lord and Mother Brain try to turn every dragon evil The N team rescues Puff a white last good dragon baby

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw causes dairy cows to stop producing milk so people will have to buy products from his store

programme.title: The Great Grape Ape

programme.title: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Cities At War - Paris
programme.desc: This programme follows the award-winning trilogy whose theme was the miraculous resilience of the human spirit in the face of adversity The original trilogy examined London Berlin and Leningrad and showed how their people coped with the ravages of World War II This one-off studies Paris and the effects that the war had on the French nation

programme.title: Vietnam Nurses
programme.desc: The untold stories of six Australian army nurses who served at the only Australian field hospital in the Vietnam War

programme.title: The Underground War - Part 2
programme.desc: A two-part documentary about networks of underground tunnels built on the front lines in the First World War During World War One a barbaric war was fought deep beneath the trenches in a maze of tunnels and dugouts over 10 metres underground

programme.title: Hitchhiker 509
programme.desc: A homeless conman couple tries to swindle a seemingly senile old lady out of her home by trying to convince her that the war is still on Big mistake

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: An emotionally unstable woman becomes obsessed with the idea that her husband is having an affair

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Both sides are kidnapping agents at such a rate that almost no one is left on either side

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: It was a dark and stormy night when BJ and the Bear drove two Transylvanian coffins from Frisco to LA meeting up along the way with murder mayhem and maybe even Count Dracula

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The presence of a masterful escape-artist POW threatens to destabilize Hogans set-up at Stalag 13

programme.title: Hogans 318
programme.desc: Hogans 318

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Crew take in a young orphan girl and go out of their way to make a happy home for her on their island But their extraordinary behavior arouses Binghamtons suspicions and he uses the situation to have the 73 Crew sized up as possible Section 8s by some visiting Psychiatrists

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: During a mission to investigate the crash site of a Japanese transport plane McHale and The Crew recover 4 million dollars in American cash Thinking that its counterfeit they return to base where Gruber later trades it to Chief Urulu for some native trinkets But when they find out that the money is real - Stolen by the Japs from a bank in The Philippines - Gruber challenges Urulu to a winner-take-all poker game to get it back

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers acts of kindness towards his new waitress friend is mistaken for romantic interest by her cruel Marine Sergeant boyfriend

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Grandma Pyle visits Gomer reads his fortune and predicts Gomer will cause something bad to happen; then Sergeant Carter loses his voice while yelling at him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways are scared that a group of gangsters are on the island but it turns out just to be a parrot who also squawks wildly when he hears the words boat and jewel

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan is forced to become the Howells house-boy when the Skipper loses a bet to Mr Howell in a turtle actually a tortoise race

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa inherits some antique furniture from his recently deceased 94-year-old Uncle Willie

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Both Amos and George stoop to dirty politics while campaigning for a trip to San Francisco as a delegate representing the Ancient and Loyal Order of the Sons of the Mystic Nile

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is listed as dead so he can complete a mission

programme.title: What A Way To Go
programme.desc: A four-time widow discusses her four marriages in which all of her husbands became incredibly rich and died prematurely because of their drive to be rich

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Vega

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A friend of Jonathan Harts is killed in a motor accident just after he has left a health farm apparently committing suicide There was no warning of him being troubled so the Harts go undercover to find out what happened at the farm

programme.title: Newhart - 815
programme.desc: Newhart - 815

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam investigates a mission run by the Church of the Companions when a friend of his disappears Sandoval and the Taelons are concerned about the fields where something vital to the Taelons survival is harvested

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens suffer from radiation poisoning and develop suits to protect themselves Meanwhile the government attempts to shut down Harrison and his team believing that the alien menace is no more

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Arcanes mentor Dr Oliver Duncan is mysteriously killed everyone assumes Arcane is to blame Unfazed Arcane attempts to steal Duncans cold fusion research by romancing his daughter Louise who has plans of her own

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcanes genius is about to be publicly lauded in an autobiographical film But the actor playing him is found murdered in Arcanes trailer Who was the murderer - and was Arcane the intended victim

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: An Eagle is sent onto the surface of the planet Psychon which has titanium needed for repairs to the Alpha Base It fails to return and is used by Psychon scientist Mentor as bait with which to entice other members of the Alphan crew onto the planet Mentor is building a biological computer that will hopefully transform his deteriorating planet back into the Eden it once was However the machine can only be fueled by the living brains of humans and Mentor has his eye on those of the Alphan crew Fortunately Mentor is not alone on the planet; his innocent daughter the shape-shifting Maya is unaware of her fathers plans so Koenig tries to convince her to side with the Alphans

programme.title: Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: The same woman Karen Black appears in three tales as a blackmailed teacher a tormented lover and opposite sisters

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Uncle Jesse reconvenes the Ridge Raiders when he learns that Boss has misappropriated funds for a senior citizens center to build a strip club But when other members of the Ridge Raiders resort to questionable tactics - such as bombing old moonshine stills - Jesse convinces them there are other ways to protest Boss actions

programme.title: Hercules 212
programme.desc: Hercules 212

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam investigates the suspicious death of a banker which he saw in a dream It seems to be an exiled Taelon spirit that is contacting him Daan berates Zoor for his money and power hungry attitude

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone pursues a bank robber Martin Sheen fearing he will kill a teller he manipulated in order to obtain information

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Briggs poses as an American tourist and subjects himself to a show trial in order to discredit a public prosecutor attempting to seize absolute power in his country

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday becomes emotionally involved in a rape-murder case of a Japanese-American war widow especially after he sees how beautiful she was and after he finds out that she left a young daughter behind Also there might be a connection with the rape of another woman the previous night Now Friday and Gannon must search for the rapist before he strikes again

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot during a routine stop of a car Friday and Gannon find the driver and passenger and learn they are paroled convicts The police officer cannot remember anything about the shooting event to help convict the two men

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A pretty airline stewardess badly injures Kimble in a traffic accident and in his delirium he admits who he is and she helps him In turn Kimble helps her realize the married man shes dating is not right for her

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: The sociopathic son of a neighbor recently returned from away stirs up serious trouble for the Barclays

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is asked by Amarillo Ames to help drive his herd to Dodge City and take over if he dies but he doesnt want to tell the men or his daughter why Ames dies so Cheyenne is forced to take over by force as he overcomes multiple foes

programme.title: Attack of the Giant Leaches
programme.desc: Fear grips a nondescript city after its residents disappear mysteriously from across the town Surprisingly a gamekeeper stumbles upon the role of blood-sucking leeches behind the disappearances

programme.title: Guyver II Dark Hero
programme.desc: Sean Barker unwilling host to an alien bio-armor known as the Guyver must fight the Kronos Corporation again before they discover the secrets of the Guyvers origin

programme.title: Highlander
programme.desc: An immortal Scottish swordsman must confront the last of his immortal opponents a murderously brutal barbarian who lusts for the fabled Prize

programme.title: Exterminators Of The Year 3000
programme.desc: In the year 3000 the Earth has been rendered a desert by nuclear war A group of survivors goes in search of rare and valuable water but standing in their way are the evil Exterminators who live only to cause pain and misery

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Badge of the Assassin
programme.desc: Three black revolutionaries gun down two New York City police officers The subsequent investigation puts a white assistant DA and a black police detective on the trail of the killers that leads from New York to San Francisco and down to New Orleans

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM plans to steal currency from the Philadelphia Mint using a gravity ray which can melt anything in their path and also produce impenetrable crystal armor for their vehicles

programme.title: Teknoman

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: The Red Horror Evil

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Simon gets shot by a love-at-first-sight arrow and falls in love with Mother Brain

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After the Computer Mind Mirror of Mother Brain says that Princess Lana is the most beautiful of them all the Eggplant Wizard makes a poison apple that will make Princess Lana fall asleep

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Bobby is bitten by a poisonous creature and an antidote can only be found at the garden of queen Zinn Will his friends be able to find it in time and convince the queen to give them the cure

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Penny and Talon compete to solve the mystery of the Sphinx while Gadget is stuck with a riddle of his own

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget is on the hunt for signs of Dr Claws latest medical experiment but Penny finds it first

programme.title: Challenge of the Gobots
programme.desc: In an attempt to take over the Earth by travelling into the past the Renegades accidentally go back to ancient Rome and are mistaken for gods

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Challenge of the GoBots

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: With a few clues and a little conjuring Gillian produces a map showing the destination of the original Lightning League that disappeared years ago In a far off place untouched by Saw Boss Jayce is disgusted to find them playing war games

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The powerful liberty stone protects Aloar from all invaders by creating the spidereen whirlpool Gillian brings the league to this planet to see his old magician friend Axilar and to use the stone to seek Audrics whereabouts

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM steals a seemingly worthless painting from a home in Rio De Janeiro Matt Trakker calls in the MASK team after learning the painting may contain a secret map to lost Nazi treasure
